cluster: C5: Cytokinin + sugar/T6P/TOR + miR396 + G-protein + KIX-PPD-MYC

edges.evidence: trans-zeatin and trans-zeatin riboside levels fourfold higher in inflorescences of ckx3 ckx5 mutants
CKX5 localizes to placentas; ckx3 ckx5 shows twice as many ovules
CKX2 degrades cytokinin in micropylar endosperm, promoting endosperm growth
IPT genes strongly expressed in chalazal endosperm cyst; increase CK levels
cytokinin is perceived by AHK2/AHK3/CRE1(AHK4)
ahk3 mutant cytokinin receptor affects seed size
cre1 ahk2 ahk3 triple mutant produces larger seeds

edges.mechanism: phosphorelay via AHP to activate type-B ARRs
edges.evidence: CK signaling via AHP and ARR type-B
ckx3 ckx5 ahp6 triple mutants had 23% more siliques; AHP6 acts as feedback repressor
The WUS domain marking the organizing center of the SAM was enlarged in ckx3 ckx5 mutants
ckx3 ckx5 mutant gynoecia contained almost twice as many ovules as wild-type

edges.mechanism: G-protein gamma subunit extends proliferative growth period
edges.evidence: Loss-of-function agg3 mutants showed reduced seed/organ size; overexpression increased size

edges.mechanism: binds AGB1 via gamma-like N-terminal region
edges.evidence: AGG3 interacts with the Arabidopsis G protein beta subunit AGB1 in yeast

edges.mechanism: AGB1 recruits AGG3 to plasma membrane
edges.evidence: AGB1 localized to cytoplasmic face of plasma membrane by interacting with Gγ subunits

edges.mechanism: Gα subunit required for heterotrimer function
edges.evidence: role of AGG3 in organ size control is dependent on functional GPA1 and AGB1
overexpression of AGG3 significantly increased seed and organ size of wild-type plants

edges.mechanism: physical interaction forming KIX-PPD repressor complex
edges.evidence: KIX8/9 and PPD1/2 form KIX-PPD complex

edges.mechanism: physical interaction forming KIX-PPD repressor complex
edges.evidence: KIX9 interacts with PPD2 in repressor complex

edges.mechanism: MYC3 binds G-box in GIF1 promoter
edges.evidence: MYC3 and MYC4 directly bind to the GIF1 promoter via G-box element at -425 bp

edges.mechanism: MYC4 binds G-box in GIF1 promoter
edges.evidence: MYC3/4 directly bind GIF1 promoter; GIF1 expression upregulated in myc3 myc4 mutants

edges.mechanism: PPD1 interacts with MYC3/4 to repress GIF1
edges.evidence: PPD1/2 interact with MYC3/4; required for MYC binding to GIF1 promoter
GIF1 upregulated in ppd1-2 ppd2-cr siliques
GIF1 elevated in kix8-1 kix9-1 mutants

edges.mechanism: F-box SAP targets KIX-PPD for 26S proteasome degradation
edges.evidence: SAP positively regulates organ growth by targeting the KIX-PPD complex for 26S proteasome-dependent degradation
gif1 mutants: reduced cell number in outer integuments; 35S:GIF1 overexpression produces larger seeds
gif1 mutants small seeds; 35S:GIF1 overexpression large seeds
GRF-GIF duo recruits SWI2/SNF2 complexes activating target genes
Increase in AtGIF1/AN3 activity enhanced and prolonged CYCB1;1 expression
miR396 species target and induce the cleavage of AtGRF mRNA (AtGRF1-4, AtGRF7-9)
overexpression of GRF1 and GRF2 in Arabidopsis resulted in larger leaves and increased seed weight and seed size
Tre6P synthesis by TPS1 is essential for embryogenesis
Tre6P acts via the inhibition of SUCROSE-NON-FERMENTING1-RELATED KINASE1

edges.mechanism: antagonistic kinase pair for energy sensing
edges.evidence: SnRK1 and TOR are antagonistic: TOR activity inhibited under energy-limiting conditions; T6P/SnRK1 interaction regulates carbon allocation

edges.mechanism: Tre6P synthesis essential for embryogenesis/seed filling
edges.evidence: Null tps1-1 mutants show embryos failing to complete embryogenesis, becoming arrested at the torpedo stage
T6P is a signal of Suc status
Tre6P is not only a signal of Suc status but also a negative feedback regulator of Suc levels

edges.mechanism: T6P signaling promotes seed filling and storage reserve accumulation
edges.evidence: T6P in seed development promotes filling and growth

perturbations.evidence_sentence: ckx3 ckx5 seeds larger; total seed yield increased 55%; siliques contained up to 110 seeds vs 65 in WT
ckx3 ckx5 ahp6 triple mutants had 23% more siliques vs ckx3 ckx5
cre1 ahk2 ahk3 produces seeds larger than WT
Loss-of-function agg3 mutants showed reduced seed/organ size
overexpression of AGG3 significantly increased seed and organ size
agb1 mutants show growth/developmental defects; AGG3 function requires AGB1
gpa1 mutants show growth/developmental defects; AGG3 function requires GPA1
kix8-1 kix9-1 mutant plants exhibited larger seeds and heavier seed weight
ppd1 ppd2 mutants show larger seeds; GIF1 upregulated
myc3 myc4 large seeds; proliferation and elongation increased in integuments
gif1 mutants small, light seeds; reduced proliferation in integuments
gif1 myc3 myc4 reverts to gif1 small-seed phenotype; GIF1 epistatic
35S:SAP plants produce larger seeds; GIF1 expression elevated
Up-regulating miR396 resulted in smaller fruit or seed size
overexpression of GRF1 and GRF2 in Arabidopsis resulted in larger leaves and increased seed weight and size
overexpression of GRF2 increases seed weight and seed size
Null tps1-1 mutants show embryos failing to complete embryogenesis; arrested at torpedo stage
